name: The nurse case manager is pressuring me to return to work early—what do I do?
description: Follow your treating doctor's restrictions only. Nurse case managers work for insurance—your doctor controls work status. Document all pressure attempts.

mainEntity.name: The nurse case manager is pressuring me to return to work early—what do I do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Follow your treating doctor's restrictions only. Nurse case managers work for insurance—your doctor controls work status. Document all pressure attempts.
